description: Close the remaining beta gaps in harness-llm-wiki by integrating review into the main pipeline, compiling a multi-page wiki core set, upgrading to run-level patch sets, making CLI stages artifact-aware, enforcing parser config fail-fast, and making patch apply drive real wiki state.

userStories.title: Add a formal review stage to PipelineRunner
userStories.description: As a system operator, I want PipelineRunner to execute a real review stage after gate so that the runtime matches the documented 11-stage pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: PipelineRunner runs a dedicated review stage after gate on every completed run
The RunManifest records a review stage entry whether the run auto-merges or enters pending review
`docos report <run_id>` shows the review stage status for a completed run
python -m mypy docos/ exits with code 0
python -m pytest tests/ -q exits with code 0
